overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of a medieval village in a video game engine, featuring timber-framed buildings, dirt streets, and NPC villagers. The camera follows a character moving from a guarded building entrance through narrow alleys and open courtyards, ending at a tannery workshop with a worker stirring a large vat.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunlit main street with timber houses on both sides. The camera approaches a tannery building with a large wooden dyeing vat out front and colorful laundry hanging between structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a guarded fortification through narrow village corridors that eventually open into a sunlit public square. It begins at a building entrance flanked by guards with banners, gliding past sandbag fortifications before turning right into a narrow courtyard filled with timber-framed structures and a hay cart. As the camera navigates a winding dirt alley between leaning buildings and scattered logs, a distant stone tower remains a constant landmark in the background. The scene then expands as the path opens into a wider village square, leading the camera under a prominent stone archway bridge. Finally, the movement carries the viewer into a bright, sunlit street lined with stacked wooden crates and vibrant autumn trees.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright village street into the intimate workspace of a local tannery. It begins by gliding along a sunlit main street lined with timber houses, moving toward a workshop where colorful laundry hangs between the structures. As the camera approaches, it circles around the tannery building to focus on a large wooden dyeing vat positioned out front. The perspective then shifts closer to a worker stirring the vat with a long pole, capturing the detailed textures of the timber and fabric before finally pulling away back toward the open street.
